name: CareCredit Rewards Mastercard®

earning_rates.notes: 2+ points per $1 at CareCredit enrolled provider locations for purchases under $200
1 point per $1 for purchases $200+ at CareCredit enrolled locations
1 point per $1 on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Mastercard acceptance
other_benefits.description: Can be used anywhere Mastercard is accepted (unlike the store-only CareCredit card)

other_benefits.name: Promotional financing
other_benefits.description: Same promotional financing options as CareCredit card at enrolled provider locations

notes: Upgrade from CareCredit Card. Earns points on healthcare and general spending. Retains promotional financing at CareCredit providers while adding rewards on everyday spending. Points redeemable for statement credit.
deprecated_reason: Store-card retail co-brand. Users searching OpenCard generally aren't shopping for retailer-specific cards. Excluded from main listings.
